form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 38-day let-up. First-up after three months 2nd in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1250m, 3 len behind Miss World with 58.5kg at $11. Previously second-up 10th of 12 at Kenilworth in the G1 Cape Fillies Guineas on December 6 over 1600m, 6 len behind Quickstepgal with 60kg at $126. Talented filly who was good fresh and fitter for it. Improver with winning prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Second-up. Comes off a 38-day let-up. Talented filly who was good fresh and fitter for it. Improver with winning prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made contact with Princess Of Gaul leaving the stalls.

form.formComment: Comes off a 31 day let-up. Most recently second last of 7 at Scottsville on March 11 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Rahhabba carrying 58.5kg at $26. The start before that second last of 12 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Tara Star with 58.5kg at $13.50. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Comes off a 31 day let-up. Most recently second last of 7 at Scottsville on March 11 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Rahhabba carrying 58.5kg at $26. The start before that second last of 12 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Tara Star with 58.5kg at $13.50. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Most recently 2nd of 9 at this track on March 27 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Silver Salute carrying 57.5kg at $11. The run before that 11th of 15 at Scottsville on February 15 over 1500m, 4.5 len behind Cleartherunway with 60.5kg at $76. Not far away last time but hard to have in this contest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(21). Most recently 2nd of 9 at this track on March 27 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Silver Salute carrying 57.5kg at $11. The run before that 11th of 15 at Scottsville on February 15 over 1500m, 4.5 len behind Cleartherunway with 60.5kg at $76. Not far away last time but hard to have in this contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, came together and bumped with Qhawekazi.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd of 8 at this track on March 29 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Ubukhwebezana carrying 63kg at $34. The start before that second last of 9 at Greyville All Weather on February 27 over 1400m, 12 len behind De Vlugge with 63kg at $11. Not far away of late and meets winner better at the weights. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(9). Last start 2nd of 8 at this track on March 29 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Ubukhwebezana carrying 63kg at $34. The start before that second last of 9 at Greyville All Weather on February 27 over 1400m, 12 len behind De Vlugge with 63kg at $11. Not far away of late and meets winner better at the weights. Worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost 1 length. Not persevered with from the 250m.
Difficult to settle in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Greyville All Weather November 12 over 1800m, 6 len behind Sundance Kid carrying 58.5kg at $5. First up last campaign third of 8 at Greyville All Weather October 3 over 1800m, 1.2 len behind Ice Rain carrying 60kg at $5.50. Happy to work around.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Resuming. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Greyville All Weather November 12 over 1800m, 6 len behind Sundance Kid carrying 58.5kg at $5. First up last campaign third of 8 at Greyville All Weather October 3 over 1800m, 1.2 len behind Ice Rain carrying 60kg at $5.50. Happy to work around.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 1600m secured the lead from a wide draw.
Hung out from the 100m and thereafter shifted out away from the crop.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 6th of 9 at Scottsville on March 1 over 1200m, 9 len behind Vihaan's Web carrying 57kg at $51. Second run from a spell ran last of 10 at Scottsville on March 15 over 1400m, 12 len behind Past Is Prologue carrying 63.7kg at $11. Fully tested on her recent run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(11). Third-up today. Resuming 6th of 9 at Scottsville on March 1 over 1200m, 9 len behind Vihaan's Web carrying 57kg at $51. Second run from a spell ran last of 10 at Scottsville on March 15 over 1400m, 12 len behind Past Is Prologue carrying 63.7kg at $11. Fully tested on her recent run.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at this track December 26 over 1600m, a neck behind Ladyofdistinction with 55kg at $11. On debut third of 16 at Scottsville September 21 over 1200m, 5 len behind Showgirl carrying 58kg at $4.50. Can return with a bold run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at this track December 26 over 1600m, a neck behind Ladyofdistinction with 55kg at $11. On debut third of 16 at Scottsville September 21 over 1200m, 5 len behind Showgirl carrying 58kg at $4.50. Can return with a bold run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to hang in and brushed Nautical Landing leaving the 400m.

form.formComment: Most recently won by 0.8 len at this track March 29 over 1200m defeating Perilla carrying 63kg at $9. The race before that 10th of 12 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Tara Star carrying 57kg at $17. Goes very well course and distance. Got the job done last time and is a leading hope again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(9). Most recently won by 0.8 len at this track March 29 over 1200m defeating Perilla carrying 63kg at $9. The race before that 10th of 12 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Tara Star carrying 57kg at $17. Goes very well course and distance. Got the job done last time and is a leading hope again.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Racing well recently. Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 9 at Turffontein Standside on March 7 over 1400m, 0.8 len behind Pretty Persuasive carrying 60.5kg at $8. Before that 4th of 8 at Turffontein Inside on February 12 over 1450m, 6 len behind Care Forgot carrying 59kg at $11. Narrowly missed last start and is a top chance again.
